description: This file defines a REST API controller for managing corrective actions within a defect management system. It provides endpoints for listing, retrieving, creating, updating, and deleting corrective action records, leveraging Spring Boot annotations and Swagger documentation.

classes.name: CorrectiveActionController
classes.description: REST controller responsible for CRUD operations on corrective actions, facilitating their management through HTTP requests.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Handles GET requests to list paginated corrective actions with optional filters.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Handles GET request to retrieve a specific corrective action by ID.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Handles POST request to create a new corrective action for a defect.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Handles PUT request to update an existing corrective action identified by ID.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Handles DELETE request to remove a corrective action by ID.
